title: Public plan coordination and startup agent readiness
mission: Make repository plans a public machine-readable coordination surface and show actionable local agent readiness whenever AgentSwitchboard starts.
dependencies: AgentSwitchboard PR #33 doctrine head is the branch floor
Existing GNHF fleet state remains the local readiness evidence source
safeParallelWork: Provider runtime repair that does not edit public plan or startup readiness files
Child-repository feature work using separate branches and worktrees
ownedScope: canonical instruction, harness registry, artifact registry, and template wiring
forbiddenScope: Installing agents from the startup report
Live provider calls from repository validation
Automatic push, merge, deployment, or target mutation
expectedArtifacts: Canonical public-plan coordination skill, capability, and trigger
Read-only agent startup readiness JSON and English report

tasks.title: Build public plan contract
acceptanceCriteria: Plans are distinct from pull requests
Public data and proof boundaries are explicit
evidence: Tracked schema, registry, documentation, validator, and CI workflow
PR #34 carries the implementation and review evidence

tasks.title: Build startup readiness report
acceptanceCriteria: Report identifies ready, blocked, and verification-required agents
Every blocked state has actionable guidance
No install, authentication, provider, or mutation action occurs
evidence: Fixture-driven PowerShell validator and Linux structural test
PR #34 exact-head CI is the proof gate

tasks.title: Add canonical repository startup launcher
acceptanceCriteria: Readiness is displayed before delegated sprint launch
evidence: PR #34 exact-head CI is the proof gate

tasks.title: Propagate public plans through child-repository PRs
outputs: Repo-local plans directories in registered child repositories
acceptanceCriteria: Each child adopts through its own reviewable PR
Local product authority and plan specialization are preserved

proof.target: repository contract, fixture harness, startup launcher composition, and cross-platform CI
proof.ceiling: Does not prove provider authentication, model availability, quota, a hosted response, child-repository adoption, or operator acceptance.

notes: Wait for PR #34 exact-head validation and landing before taking ROLLOUT-01.
Reinspect this plan, Git state, and open PRs before work.
Use one child-repository PR per adoption lane.
